notes: Object-label multiset per scene, enumerated by inspecting the RGB frames directly (independent of the SAM/CLIP/VGGT/graph-fusion pipeline), mapped to configs/label_vocab/indoor_open_vocab.json. Counts are scene-level (objects present across the 10 frames). Relations omitted: the pipeline's relations are geometric heuristics (near/above/left_of/...) not independently annotatable. PILOT: freiburg1_desk only; remaining scenes added after the approach is validated. MUST be human-verified before paper use.
